name: routing_helper_call
description: GMAB value passed to a chkGrpMbr()/getGrpRoute() style helper. This is a field-reference idiom the core field matcher cannot see (the field name is not in the statement), so it is added here as an experience-driven pattern.

name: prefix_compare_two_char
description: Two-character prefix comparison against the group member, e.g. %SUBST(GRPMBR:1:2) = 'HB'. Captures the out-of-list prefix candidate for review.
